hero.title: Live Medellín like a work of art
hero.subtitle: Three boutique lofts. Designed by Robin House. A quiet street, 5 minutes from Laureles' main avenue.

bookingBar.tooManyGuests: For groups larger than 4, please reach out on WhatsApp.
bookingBar.fiscalNote: Prices shown by Housy Host may include VAT and other taxes per local regulation. The final invoice itemizes every charge.

concept.title: A living gallery in the heart of Laureles
concept.body: Casa Museo is where the rigor of a curated museum meets the warmth of a paisa home. Every loft was composed with exhibition-grade attention: carved stone, floating oak, ambient LED lighting, custom-built beds. You live inside the artwork.

units.title: Three ways to inhabit the house

neighborhood.title: Laureles — the walkable side of Medellín
neighborhood.body: Five minutes from Laureles' First and Second Park. Specialty coffee (Ritual, Revolución, Semilla), restaurants on Avenida Nutibara, EnCicla bike routes, and the Atanasio Girardot Stadium. The local, walkable face of Medellín.

highlights.title: Specialty coffee
highlights.body: Ritual, Revolución and Semilla, all 5 min on foot.

highlights.title: La 70 & Stadium
highlights.body: Bars, restaurants and matches a few minutes away.

footer.tagline: Casa Museo · Live Medellín like a work of art.

whatsapp.label: Chat on WhatsApp
whatsapp.preset: Hi! I'm browsing Casa Laureles 41 and I have a question about availability.

cookies.title: Cookies to improve your visit
cookies.body: We use analytics cookies to understand how the site is used and improve it. You can disable them at any time.
